1.text: The word<S>1697</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> that came to Micah<S>4318</S> the Morasthite<S>4183</S> in the days<S>3117</S> of Jotham<S>3147</S>, Ahaz<S>271</S>, and Hezekiah<S>3169</S>, kings<S>4428</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, which he saw<S>2372</S> concerning Samaria<S>8111</S> and Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S>, all ye people<S>5971</S>; hearken<S>7181</S>, O earth<S>776</S>, and all that therein<S>4393</S> is: and let the Lord<S>136</S> GOD<S>3069</S> be witness<S>5707</S> against you, the Lord<S>136</S> from his holy<S>6944</S> temple<S>1964</S>. <sup>all ye: Heb. ye people, all of them</sup> <sup>all that: Heb. the fulness thereof</sup>
For, behold, the LORD<S>3068</S> cometh forth<S>3318</S> out of his place<S>4725</S>, and will come down<S>3381</S>, and tread<S>1869</S> upon the high places<S>1116</S> of the earth<S>776</S>.

And the mountains<S>2022</S> shall be molten<S>4549</S> under him, and the valleys<S>6010</S> shall be cleft<S>1234</S>, as wax<S>1749</S> before<S>6440</S> the fire<S>784</S>, and as the waters<S>4325</S> that are poured<S>5064</S> down a steep place<S>4174</S>. <sup>a steep: Heb. a descent</sup>

For the transgression<S>6588</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> is all this, and for the sins<S>2403</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. What is the transgression<S>6588</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>? is it not Samaria<S>8111</S>? and what are the high places<S>1116</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>? are they not Jerusalem<S>3389</S>?

Therefore I will make<S>7760</S> Samaria<S>8111</S> as an heap<S>5856</S> of the field<S>7704</S>, and as plantings<S>4302</S> of a vineyard<S>3754</S>: and I will pour down<S>5064</S> the stones<S>68</S> thereof into the valley<S>1516</S>, and I will discover<S>1540</S> the foundations<S>3247</S> thereof.

And all the graven images<S>6456</S> thereof shall be beaten to pieces<S>3807</S>, and all the hires<S>868</S> thereof shall be burned<S>8313</S> with the fire<S>784</S>, and all the idols<S>6091</S> thereof will I lay<S>7760</S> desolate<S>8077</S>: for she gathered<S>6908</S> it of the hire<S>868</S> of an harlot<S>2181</S>, and they shall return<S>7725</S> to the hire<S>868</S> of an harlot<S>2181</S>.

Therefore I will wail<S>5594</S> and howl<S>3213</S>, I will go<S>3212</S> stripped<S>7758</S> <S>7758</S> and naked<S>6174</S>: I will make<S>6213</S> a wailing<S>4553</S> like the dragons<S>8577</S>, and mourning<S>60</S> as the owls<S>1323</S> <S>3284</S>. <sup>owls: Heb. daughters of the owl</sup>

For her wound<S>4347</S> is incurable<S>605</S>; for it is come<S>935</S> unto Judah<S>3063</S>; he is come<S>5060</S> unto the gate<S>8179</S> of my people<S>5971</S>, even to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>. <sup>her: or, she is grievously sick of her wounds</sup>

Declare<S>5046</S> ye it not at Gath<S>1661</S>, weep<S>1058</S> ye not at all<S>1058</S>: in the house of Aphrah<S>1036</S> roll<S>6428</S> <S>6428</S> thyself in the dust<S>6083</S>. <sup>Aphrah: that is, Dust</sup>

Pass ye away<S>5674</S>, thou inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Saphir<S>8208</S>, having thy shame<S>1322</S> naked<S>6181</S>: the inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Zaanan<S>6630</S> came not forth<S>3318</S> in the mourning<S>4553</S> of Bethezel<S>1018</S>; he shall receive<S>3947</S> of you his standing<S>5979</S>. <sup>thou: or, thou that dwellest fairly</sup> <sup>inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress</sup> <sup>Zaanan: or, The country of flocks</sup> <sup>Bethezel: or, A place near</sup>

For the inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Maroth<S>4796</S> waited carefully<S>2342</S> for good<S>2896</S>: but evil<S>7451</S> came down<S>3381</S> from the LORD<S>3068</S> unto the gate<S>8179</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>. <sup>inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress</sup> <sup>waited: or, was grieved</sup>

O thou inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Lachish<S>3923</S>, bind<S>7573</S> the chariot<S>4818</S> to the swift beast<S>7409</S>: she is the beginning<S>7225</S> of the sin<S>2403</S> to the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>: for the transgressions<S>6588</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> were found<S>4672</S> in thee. <sup>inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress</sup>

Therefore shalt thou give<S>5414</S> presents<S>7964</S> to Moreshethgath<S>4182</S>: the houses<S>1004</S> of Achzib<S>392</S> shall be a lie<S>391</S> to the kings<S>4428</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. <sup>to: or, for Moreshethgath</sup> <sup>Achzib: that is, A lie</sup>

Yet will I bring<S>935</S> an heir<S>3423</S> unto thee, O inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Mareshah<S>4762</S>: he shall come<S>935</S> unto Adullam<S>5725</S> the glory<S>3519</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. <sup>inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress</sup> <sup>he: or, the glory of Israel shall, etc</sup>

Make thee bald<S>7139</S>, and poll<S>1494</S> thee for thy delicate<S>8588</S> children<S>1121</S>; enlarge<S>7337</S> thy baldness<S>7144</S> as the eagle<S>5404</S>; for they are gone into captivity<S>1540</S> from thee.

2.text: Woe<S>1945</S> to them that devise<S>2803</S> iniquity<S>205</S>, and work<S>6466</S> evil<S>7451</S> upon their beds<S>4904</S>! when the morning<S>1242</S> is light<S>216</S>, they practise<S>6213</S> it, because it is<S>3426</S> in the power<S>410</S> of their hand<S>3027</S>.

And they covet<S>2530</S> fields<S>7704</S>, and take them by violence<S>1497</S>; and houses<S>1004</S>, and take them away<S>5375</S>: so they oppress<S>6231</S> a man<S>1397</S> and his house<S>1004</S>, even a man<S>376</S> and his heritage<S>5159</S>. <sup>oppress: or, defraud</sup>

Therefore thus saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>; Behold, against this family<S>4940</S> do I devise<S>2803</S> an evil<S>7451</S>, from which ye shall not remove<S>4185</S> your necks<S>6677</S>; neither shall ye go<S>3212</S> haughtily<S>7317</S>: for this time<S>6256</S> is evil<S>7451</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S> shall one take up<S>5375</S> a parable<S>4912</S> against you, and lament<S>5091</S> with a doleful<S>5093</S> lamentation<S>5092</S>, and say<S>559</S>, We be utterly<S>7703</S> spoiled<S>7703</S>: he hath changed<S>4171</S> the portion<S>2506</S> of my people<S>5971</S>: how hath he removed<S>4185</S> it from me! turning away<S>7725</S> he hath divided<S>2505</S> our fields<S>7704</S>. <sup>a doleful: Heb. a lamentation of lamentations</sup> <sup>turning: or, instead of restoring</sup>
Therefore thou shalt have none that shall cast<S>7993</S> a cord<S>2256</S> by lot<S>1486</S> in the congregation<S>6951</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>.

Prophesy<S>5197</S> ye not, say they to them that prophesy<S>5197</S>: they shall not prophesy<S>5197</S> to them, that they shall not take<S>5253</S> shame<S>3639</S>. <sup>Prophesy ye: or, Prophesy not as they prophesy: Heb. Drop, etc</sup>

O thou that art named<S>559</S> the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, is the spirit<S>7307</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> straitened<S>7114</S>? are these his doings<S>4611</S>? do not my words<S>1697</S> do good<S>3190</S> to him that walketh<S>1980</S> uprightly<S>3477</S>? <sup>straitened: or, shortened?</sup> <sup>uprightly: Heb. upright?</sup>

Even of late<S>865</S> my people<S>5971</S> is risen up<S>6965</S> as an enemy<S>341</S>: ye pull off<S>6584</S> the robe<S>145</S> with<S>4136</S> the garment<S>8008</S> from them that pass<S>5674</S> by securely<S>983</S> as men averse<S>7725</S> from war<S>4421</S>. <sup>of late: Heb. yesterday</sup> <sup>with the: Heb. over against a</sup>

The women<S>802</S> of my people<S>5971</S> have ye cast out<S>1644</S> from their pleasant<S>8588</S> houses<S>1004</S>; from their children<S>5768</S> have ye taken away<S>3947</S> my glory<S>1926</S> for ever<S>5769</S>. <sup>women: or, wives</sup>

Arise<S>6965</S> ye, and depart<S>3212</S>; for this is not your rest<S>4496</S>: because it is polluted<S>2930</S>, it shall destroy<S>2254</S> you, even with a sore<S>4834</S> destruction<S>2256</S>.

If<S>3863</S> a man<S>376</S> walking<S>1980</S> in the spirit<S>7307</S> and falsehood<S>8267</S> do lie<S>3576</S>, saying, I will prophesy<S>5197</S> unto thee of wine<S>3196</S> and of strong drink<S>7941</S>; he shall even be the prophet<S>5197</S> of this people<S>5971</S>. <sup>walking: or, walk with the wind, and lie falsely</sup>

I will surely<S>622</S> assemble<S>622</S>, O Jacob<S>3290</S>, all of thee; I will surely<S>6908</S> gather<S>6908</S> the remnant<S>7611</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>; I will put<S>7760</S> them together<S>3162</S> as the sheep<S>6629</S> of Bozrah<S>1223</S> <S>1224</S>, as the flock<S>5739</S> in the midst<S>8432</S> of their fold<S>1699</S>: they shall make great noise<S>1949</S> by reason of the multitude of men<S>120</S>.

The breaker<S>6555</S> is come up<S>5927</S> before<S>6440</S> them: they have broken up<S>6555</S>, and have passed through<S>5674</S> the gate<S>8179</S>, and are gone out<S>3318</S> by it: and their king<S>4428</S> shall pass<S>5674</S> before<S>6440</S> them, and the LORD<S>3068</S> on the head<S>7218</S> of them.

3.text: And I said<S>559</S>, Hear<S>8085</S>, I pray you, O heads<S>7218</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and ye princes<S>7101</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>; Is it not for you to know<S>3045</S> judgment<S>4941</S>?

Who hate<S>8130</S> the good<S>2896</S>, and love<S>157</S> the evil<S>7451</S>; who pluck off<S>1497</S> their skin<S>5785</S> from off them, and their flesh<S>7607</S> from off their bones<S>6106</S>;

Who also eat<S>398</S> the flesh<S>7607</S> of my people<S>5971</S>, and flay<S>6584</S> their skin<S>5785</S> from off them; and they break<S>6476</S> their bones<S>6106</S>, and chop them in pieces<S>6566</S>, as for the pot<S>5518</S>, and as flesh<S>1320</S> within<S>8432</S> the caldron<S>7037</S>.

Then shall they cry<S>2199</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>, but he will not hear<S>6030</S> them: he will even hide<S>5641</S> his face<S>6440</S> from them at that time<S>6256</S>, as they have behaved themselves ill<S>7489</S> in their doings<S>4611</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> concerning the prophets<S>5030</S> that make my people<S>5971</S> err<S>8582</S>, that bite<S>5391</S> with their teeth<S>8127</S>, and cry<S>7121</S>, Peace<S>7965</S>; and he that putteth<S>5414</S> not into their mouths<S>6310</S>, they even prepare<S>6942</S> war<S>4421</S> against him.

Therefore night<S>3915</S> shall be unto you, that ye shall not have a vision<S>2377</S>; and it shall be dark<S>2821</S> <S>2821</S> unto you, that ye shall not divine<S>7080</S>; and the sun<S>8121</S> shall go down<S>935</S> over the prophets<S>5030</S>, and the day<S>3117</S> shall be dark<S>6937</S> over them. <sup>that: vision: Heb. from a vision</sup> <sup>that: divine: Heb. from divining</sup>

Then shall the seers<S>2374</S> be ashamed<S>954</S>, and the diviners<S>7080</S> confounded<S>2659</S>: yea, they shall all cover<S>5844</S> their lips<S>8222</S>; for there is no answer<S>4617</S> of God<S>430</S>. <sup>lips: Heb. upper lip</sup>

But truly<S>199</S> I am full<S>4390</S> of power<S>3581</S> by the spirit<S>7307</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, and of judgment<S>4941</S>, and of might<S>1369</S>, to declare<S>5046</S> unto Jacob<S>3290</S> his transgression<S>6588</S>, and to Israel<S>3478</S> his sin<S>2403</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S> this, I pray you, ye heads<S>7218</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and princes<S>7101</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, that abhor<S>8581</S> judgment<S>4941</S>, and pervert<S>6140</S> all equity<S>3477</S>.
They build up<S>1129</S> Zion<S>6726</S> with blood<S>1818</S>, and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> with iniquity<S>5766</S>. <sup>blood: Heb. bloods</sup>

The heads<S>7218</S> thereof judge<S>8199</S> for reward<S>7810</S>, and the priests<S>3548</S> thereof teach<S>3384</S> for hire<S>4242</S>, and the prophets<S>5030</S> thereof divine<S>7080</S> for money<S>3701</S>: yet will they lean<S>8172</S> upon the LORD<S>3068</S>, and say<S>559</S>, Is not the LORD<S>3068</S> among<S>7130</S> us? none evil<S>7451</S> can come<S>935</S> upon us. <sup>and say: Heb. saying</sup>

Therefore shall Zion<S>6726</S> for your sake<S>1558</S> be plowed<S>2790</S> as a field<S>7704</S>, and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> shall become heaps<S>5856</S>, and the mountain<S>2022</S> of the house<S>1004</S> as the high places<S>1116</S> of the forest<S>3293</S>.

4.text: But in the last<S>319</S> days<S>3117</S> it shall come to pass, that the mountain<S>2022</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> shall be established<S>3559</S> in the top<S>7218</S> of the mountains<S>2022</S>, and it shall be exalted<S>5375</S> above the hills<S>1389</S>; and people<S>5971</S> shall flow<S>5102</S> unto it.

And many<S>7227</S> nations<S>1471</S> shall come<S>1980</S>, and say<S>559</S>, Come<S>3212</S>, and let us go up<S>5927</S> to the mountain<S>2022</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, and to the house<S>1004</S> of the God<S>430</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>; and he will teach<S>3384</S> us of his ways<S>1870</S>, and we will walk<S>3212</S> in his paths<S>734</S>: for the law<S>8451</S> shall go forth<S>3318</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, and the word<S>1697</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> from Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

And he shall judge<S>8199</S> among many<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S>, and rebuke<S>3198</S> strong<S>6099</S> nations<S>1471</S> afar off<S>7350</S>; and they shall beat<S>3807</S> their swords<S>2719</S> into plowshares<S>855</S>, and their spears<S>2595</S> into pruninghooks<S>4211</S>: nation<S>1471</S> shall not lift up<S>5375</S> a sword<S>2719</S> against nation<S>1471</S>, neither shall they learn<S>3925</S> war<S>4421</S> any more. <sup>pruninghooks: or, scythes</sup>

But they shall sit<S>3427</S> every man<S>376</S> under his vine<S>1612</S> and under his fig tree<S>8384</S>; and none shall make them afraid<S>2729</S>: for the mouth<S>6310</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S> hath spoken<S>1696</S> it.

For all people<S>5971</S> will walk<S>3212</S> every one<S>376</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of his god<S>430</S>, and we will walk<S>3212</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> our God<S>430</S> for ever<S>5769</S> and ever<S>5703</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, will I assemble<S>622</S> her that halteth<S>6760</S>, and I will gather<S>6908</S> her that is driven out<S>5080</S>, and her that I have afflicted<S>7489</S>;

And I will make<S>7760</S> her that halted<S>6760</S> a remnant<S>7611</S>, and her that was cast far off<S>1972</S> a strong<S>6099</S> nation<S>1471</S>: and the LORD<S>3068</S> shall reign<S>4427</S> over them in mount<S>2022</S> Zion<S>6726</S> from henceforth, even for<S>5704</S> ever<S>5769</S>.

And thou, O tower<S>4026</S> of the flock<S>5739</S> <S>4029</S>, the strong hold<S>6076</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, unto thee shall it come<S>857</S>, even the first<S>7223</S> dominion<S>4475</S>; the kingdom<S>4467</S> shall come<S>935</S> to the daughter<S>1323</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Now why dost thou cry<S>7321</S> out aloud<S>7452</S>? is there no king<S>4428</S> in thee? is thy counsellor<S>3289</S> perished<S>6</S>? for pangs<S>2427</S> have taken<S>2388</S> thee as a woman in travail<S>3205</S>.

Be in pain<S>2342</S>, and labour to bring forth<S>1518</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, like a woman in travail<S>3205</S>: for now shalt thou go forth<S>3318</S> out of the city<S>7151</S>, and thou shalt dwell<S>7931</S> in the field<S>7704</S>, and thou shalt go<S>935</S> even to Babylon<S>894</S>; there shalt thou be delivered<S>5337</S>; there the LORD<S>3068</S> shall redeem<S>1350</S> thee from the hand<S>3709</S> of thine enemies<S>341</S>.
Now also many<S>7227</S> nations<S>1471</S> are gathered<S>622</S> against thee, that say<S>559</S>, Let her be defiled<S>2610</S>, and let our eye<S>5869</S> look<S>2372</S> upon Zion<S>6726</S>.

But they know<S>3045</S> not the thoughts<S>4284</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, neither understand<S>995</S> they his counsel<S>6098</S>: for he shall gather<S>6908</S> them as the sheaves<S>5995</S> into the floor<S>1637</S>.

Arise<S>6965</S> and thresh<S>1758</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>: for I will make<S>7760</S> thine horn<S>7161</S> iron<S>1270</S>, and I will make<S>7760</S> thy hoofs<S>6541</S> brass<S>5154</S>: and thou shalt beat in pieces<S>1854</S> many<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S>: and I will consecrate<S>2763</S> their gain<S>1215</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>, and their substance<S>2428</S> unto the Lord<S>113</S> of the whole earth<S>776</S>.

5.text: Now gather<S>1413</S> thyself in troops<S>1416</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of troops<S>1416</S>: he hath laid<S>7760</S> siege<S>4692</S> against us: they shall smite<S>5221</S> the judge<S>8199</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> with a rod<S>7626</S> upon the cheek<S>3895</S>.

But thou, Bethlehem<S>1035</S> Ephratah<S>672</S>, though thou be little<S>6810</S> among the thousands<S>505</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, yet out of thee shall he come forth<S>3318</S> unto me that is to be ruler<S>4910</S> in Israel<S>3478</S>; whose goings forth<S>4163</S> have been from of old<S>6924</S>, from everlasting<S>3117</S> <S>5769</S>. <sup>everlasting: Heb. the days of eternity</sup>

Therefore will he give them up<S>5414</S>, until the time<S>6256</S> that she which travaileth<S>3205</S> hath brought forth<S>3205</S>: then the remnant<S>3499</S> of his brethren<S>251</S> shall return<S>7725</S> unto the children<S>1121</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.

And he shall stand<S>5975</S> and feed<S>7462</S> in the strength<S>5797</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, in the majesty<S>1347</S> of the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> his God<S>430</S>; and they shall abide<S>3427</S>: for now shall he be great<S>1431</S> unto the ends<S>657</S> of the earth<S>776</S>. <sup>feed or, rule</sup>

And this man shall be the peace<S>7965</S>, when the Assyrian<S>804</S> shall come<S>935</S> into our land<S>776</S>: and when he shall tread<S>1869</S> in our palaces<S>759</S>, then shall we raise<S>6965</S> against him seven<S>7651</S> shepherds<S>7462</S>, and eight<S>8083</S> principal<S>5257</S> men<S>120</S>. <sup>principal: Heb. princes of</sup>

And they shall waste<S>7462</S> the land<S>776</S> of Assyria<S>804</S> with the sword<S>2719</S>, and the land<S>776</S> of Nimrod<S>5248</S> in the entrances<S>6607</S> thereof: thus shall he deliver<S>5337</S> us from the Assyrian<S>804</S>, when he cometh<S>935</S> into our land<S>776</S>, and when he treadeth<S>1869</S> within our borders<S>1366</S>. <sup>waste: Heb. eat up</sup> <sup>in the: or, with her own naked swords</sup>

And the remnant<S>7611</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall be in the midst<S>7130</S> of many<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S> as a dew<S>2919</S> from the LORD<S>3068</S>, as the showers<S>7241</S> upon the grass<S>6212</S>, that tarrieth<S>6960</S> not for man<S>376</S>, nor waiteth<S>3176</S> for the sons<S>1121</S> of men<S>120</S>.

And the remnant<S>7611</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall be among the Gentiles<S>1471</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of many<S>7227</S> people<S>5971</S> as a lion<S>738</S> among the beasts<S>929</S> of the forest<S>3293</S>, as a young lion<S>3715</S> among the flocks<S>5739</S> of sheep<S>6629</S>: who, if he go through<S>5674</S>, both treadeth down<S>7429</S>, and teareth in pieces<S>2963</S>, and none can deliver<S>5337</S>. <sup>sheep: or, goats</sup>
Thine hand<S>3027</S> shall be lifted up<S>7311</S> upon thine adversaries<S>6862</S>, and all thine enemies<S>341</S> shall be cut off<S>3772</S>.

And it shall come to pass in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, that I will cut off<S>3772</S> thy horses<S>5483</S> out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee, and I will destroy<S>6</S> thy chariots<S>4818</S>:
And I will cut off<S>3772</S> the cities<S>6145</S> <S>5892</S> of thy land<S>776</S>, and throw down<S>2040</S> all thy strong holds<S>4013</S>:
And I will cut off<S>3772</S> witchcrafts<S>3785</S> out of thine hand<S>3027</S>; and thou shalt have no more soothsayers<S>6049</S>:

Thy graven images<S>6456</S> also will I cut off<S>3772</S>, and thy standing images<S>4676</S> out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee; and thou shalt no more worship<S>7812</S> the work<S>4639</S> of thine hands<S>3027</S>. <sup>standing: or, statues</sup>
And I will pluck up<S>5428</S> thy groves<S>842</S> out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee: so will I destroy<S>8045</S> thy cities<S>6145</S> <S>5892</S>. <sup>cities: or, enemies</sup>
And I will execute<S>6213</S> vengeance<S>5359</S> in anger<S>639</S> and fury<S>2534</S> upon the heathen<S>1471</S>, such as they have not heard<S>8085</S>.

6.text: Hear<S>8085</S> ye now what the LORD<S>3068</S> saith<S>559</S>; Arise<S>6965</S>, contend<S>7378</S> thou before the mountains<S>2022</S>, and let the hills<S>1389</S> hear<S>8085</S> thy voice<S>6963</S>. <sup>before: or, with</sup>

Hear<S>8085</S> ye, O mountains<S>2022</S>, the LORD'S<S>3068</S> controversy<S>7379</S>, and ye strong<S>386</S> foundations<S>4146</S> of the earth<S>776</S>: for the LORD<S>3068</S> hath a controversy<S>7379</S> with his people<S>5971</S>, and he will plead<S>3198</S> with Israel<S>3478</S>.
O my people<S>5971</S>, what have I done<S>6213</S> unto thee? and wherein have I wearied<S>3811</S> thee? testify<S>6030</S> against me.

For I brought thee up<S>5927</S> out of the land<S>776</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S>, and redeemed<S>6299</S> thee out of the house<S>1004</S> of servants<S>5650</S>; and I sent<S>7971</S> before<S>6440</S> thee Moses<S>4872</S>, Aaron<S>175</S>, and Miriam<S>4813</S>.

O my people<S>5971</S>, remember<S>2142</S> now what Balak<S>1111</S> king<S>4428</S> of Moab<S>4124</S> consulted<S>3289</S>, and what Balaam<S>1109</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Beor<S>1160</S> answered<S>6030</S> him from Shittim<S>7851</S> unto Gilgal<S>1537</S>; that ye may know<S>3045</S> the righteousness<S>6666</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>.

Wherewith shall I come before<S>6923</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, and bow<S>3721</S> myself before the high<S>4791</S> God<S>430</S>? shall I come before<S>6923</S> him with burnt offerings<S>5930</S>, with calves<S>5695</S> of a year<S>8141</S> old<S>1121</S>? <sup>of a: Heb. sons of a year?</sup>

Will the LORD<S>3068</S> be pleased<S>7521</S> with thousands<S>505</S> of rams<S>352</S>, or with ten thousands<S>7233</S> of rivers<S>5158</S> of oil<S>8081</S>? shall I give<S>5414</S> my firstborn<S>1060</S> for my transgression<S>6588</S>, the fruit<S>6529</S> of my body<S>990</S> for the sin<S>2403</S> of my soul<S>5315</S>? <sup>body: Heb. belly</sup>

He hath shewed<S>5046</S> thee, O man<S>120</S>, what is good<S>2896</S>; and what doth the LORD<S>3068</S> require<S>1875</S> of thee, but to do<S>6213</S> justly<S>4941</S>, and to love<S>160</S> mercy<S>2617</S>, and to walk<S>3212</S> humbly<S>6800</S> with thy God<S>430</S>? <sup>walk: Heb. humble thyself to walk</sup>

The LORD'S<S>3068</S> voice<S>6963</S> crieth<S>7121</S> unto the city<S>5892</S>, and the man of wisdom<S>8454</S> shall see<S>7200</S> thy name<S>8034</S>: hear<S>8085</S> ye the rod<S>4294</S>, and who hath appointed<S>3259</S> it. <sup>the man: or, thy name shall see that which is</sup>

Are there<S>786</S> yet the treasures<S>214</S> of wickedness<S>7562</S> <S>376</S> in the house<S>1004</S> of the wicked<S>7563</S>, and the scant<S>7332</S> measure<S>374</S> that is abominable<S>2194</S>? <sup>Are: or, Is there yet unto every man an house of the, etc</sup> <sup>scant: Heb. measure of leanness</sup>
Shall I count them pure<S>2135</S> with the wicked<S>7562</S> balances<S>3976</S>, and with the bag<S>3599</S> of deceitful<S>4820</S> weights<S>68</S>? <sup>count: or, be pure with, etc</sup>

For the rich men<S>6223</S> thereof are full<S>4390</S> of violence<S>2555</S>, and the inhabitants<S>3427</S> thereof have spoken<S>1696</S> lies<S>8267</S>, and their tongue<S>3956</S> is deceitful<S>7423</S> in their mouth<S>6310</S>.
Therefore also will I make thee sick<S>2470</S> in smiting<S>5221</S> thee, in making thee desolate<S>8074</S> because of thy sins<S>2403</S>.

Thou shalt eat<S>398</S>, but not be satisfied<S>7646</S>; and thy casting down<S>3445</S> shall be in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee; and thou shalt take hold<S>5253</S>, but shalt not deliver<S>6403</S>; and that which thou deliverest<S>6403</S> will I give up<S>5414</S> to the sword<S>2719</S>.

Thou shalt sow<S>2232</S>, but thou shalt not reap<S>7114</S>; thou shalt tread<S>1869</S> the olives<S>2132</S>, but thou shalt not anoint<S>5480</S> thee with oil<S>8081</S>; and sweet wine<S>8492</S>, but shalt not drink<S>8354</S> wine<S>3196</S>.

For the statutes<S>2708</S> of Omri<S>6018</S> are kept<S>8104</S>, and all the works<S>4639</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Ahab<S>256</S>, and ye walk<S>3212</S> in their counsels<S>4156</S>; that I should make<S>5414</S> thee a desolation<S>8047</S>, and the inhabitants<S>3427</S> thereof an hissing<S>8322</S>: therefore ye shall bear<S>5375</S> the reproach<S>2781</S> of my people<S>5971</S>. <sup>For the: or, For he doth much keep the, etc</sup> <sup>desolation: or, astonishment</sup>

7.text: Woe<S>480</S> is me! for I am as when they have gathered<S>625</S> the summer fruits<S>7019</S>, as the grapegleanings<S>5955</S> of the vintage<S>1210</S>: there is no cluster<S>811</S> to eat<S>398</S>: my soul<S>5315</S> desired<S>183</S> the firstripe fruit<S>1063</S>. <sup>when: Heb. the gatherings of summer</sup>

The good<S>2623</S> man is perished<S>6</S> out of the earth<S>776</S>: and there is none upright<S>3477</S> among men<S>120</S>: they all lie in wait<S>693</S> for blood<S>1818</S>; they hunt<S>6679</S> every man<S>376</S> his brother<S>251</S> with a net<S>2764</S>. <sup>good: or, godly, or, merciful</sup>

That they may do evil<S>7451</S> with both hands<S>3709</S> earnestly<S>3190</S>, the prince<S>8269</S> asketh<S>7592</S>, and the judge<S>8199</S> asketh for a reward<S>7966</S>; and the great<S>1419</S> man, he uttereth<S>1696</S> his mischievous<S>1942</S> desire<S>5315</S>: so they wrap it up<S>5686</S>. <sup>his: Heb. the mischief of his soul</sup>

The best<S>2896</S> of them is as a brier<S>2312</S>: the most upright<S>3477</S> is sharper than a thorn hedge<S>4534</S>: the day<S>3117</S> of thy watchmen<S>6822</S> and thy visitation<S>6486</S> cometh<S>935</S>; now shall be their perplexity<S>3998</S>.

Trust<S>539</S> ye not in a friend<S>7453</S>, put ye not confidence<S>982</S> in a guide<S>441</S>: keep<S>8104</S> the doors<S>6607</S> of thy mouth<S>6310</S> from her that lieth<S>7901</S> in thy bosom<S>2436</S>.

For the son<S>1121</S> dishonoureth<S>5034</S> the father<S>1</S>, the daughter<S>1323</S> riseth up<S>6965</S> against her mother<S>517</S>, the daughter in law<S>3618</S> against her mother in law<S>2545</S>; a man's<S>376</S> enemies<S>341</S> are the men<S>582</S> of his own house<S>1004</S>.
Therefore I will look<S>6822</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>; I will wait<S>3176</S> for the God<S>430</S> of my salvation<S>3468</S>: my God<S>430</S> will hear<S>8085</S> me.

Rejoice<S>8055</S> not against me, O mine enemy<S>341</S>: when I fall<S>5307</S>, I shall arise<S>6965</S>; when I sit<S>3427</S> in darkness<S>2822</S>, the LORD<S>3068</S> shall be a light<S>216</S> unto me.

I will bear<S>5375</S> the indignation<S>2197</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, because I have sinned<S>2398</S> against him, until he plead<S>7378</S> my cause<S>7379</S>, and execute<S>6213</S> judgment<S>4941</S> for me: he will bring me forth<S>3318</S> to the light<S>216</S>, and I shall behold<S>7200</S> his righteousness<S>6666</S>.

Then she that is mine enemy<S>341</S> shall see<S>7200</S> it, and shame<S>955</S> shall cover<S>3680</S> her which said<S>559</S> unto me, Where is the LORD<S>3068</S> thy God<S>430</S>? mine eyes<S>5869</S> shall behold<S>7200</S> her: now shall she be trodden down<S>4823</S> as the mire<S>2916</S> of the streets<S>2351</S>. <sup>Then: or, And thou wilt see her that is mine enemy, and cover her with shame</sup> <sup>shall she: Heb. she shall be for a treading down</sup>
In the day<S>3117</S> that thy walls<S>1447</S> are to be built<S>1129</S>, in that day<S>3117</S> shall the decree<S>2706</S> be far removed<S>7368</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S> also he shall come<S>935</S> even to thee from Assyria<S>804</S>, and from the fortified<S>4693</S> cities<S>5892</S>, and from the fortress<S>4693</S> even to the river<S>5104</S>, and from sea<S>3220</S> to sea<S>3220</S>, and from mountain<S>2022</S> to mountain<S>2022</S>. <sup>and fromcities: or, even tocities</sup>

Notwithstanding the land<S>776</S> shall be desolate<S>8077</S> because of them that dwell<S>3427</S> therein, for the fruit<S>6529</S> of their doings<S>4611</S>. <sup>Notwithstanding: or, After that it hath been</sup>

Feed<S>7462</S> thy people<S>5971</S> with thy rod<S>7626</S>, the flock<S>6629</S> of thine heritage<S>5159</S>, which dwell<S>7931</S> solitarily<S>910</S> in the wood<S>3293</S>, in the midst<S>8432</S> of Carmel<S>3760</S>: let them feed<S>7462</S> in Bashan<S>1316</S> and Gilead<S>1568</S>, as in the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>5769</S>. <sup>Feed: or, Rule</sup>
According to the days<S>3117</S> of thy coming<S>3318</S> out of the land<S>776</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S> will I shew<S>7200</S> unto him marvellous<S>6381</S> things.

The nations<S>1471</S> shall see<S>7200</S> and be confounded<S>954</S> at all their might<S>1369</S>: they shall lay<S>7760</S> their hand<S>3027</S> upon their mouth<S>6310</S>, their ears<S>241</S> shall be deaf<S>2790</S>.

They shall lick<S>3897</S> the dust<S>6083</S> like a serpent<S>5175</S>, they shall move<S>7264</S> out of their holes<S>4526</S> like worms<S>2119</S> of the earth<S>776</S>: they shall be afraid<S>6342</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> our God<S>430</S>, and shall fear<S>3372</S> because of thee. <sup>worms: or, creeping things</sup>

Who is a God<S>410</S> like unto thee, that pardoneth<S>5375</S> iniquity<S>5771</S>, and passeth by<S>5674</S> the transgression<S>6588</S> of the remnant<S>7611</S> of his heritage<S>5159</S>? he retaineth<S>2388</S> not his anger<S>639</S> for ever<S>5703</S>, because he delighteth<S>2654</S> in mercy<S>2617</S>.

He will turn again<S>7725</S>, he will have compassion<S>7355</S> upon us; he will subdue<S>3533</S> our iniquities<S>5771</S>; and thou wilt cast<S>7993</S> all their sins<S>2403</S> into the depths<S>4688</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>.

Thou wilt perform<S>5414</S> the truth<S>571</S> to Jacob<S>3290</S>, and the mercy<S>2617</S> to Abraham<S>85</S>, which thou hast sworn<S>7650</S> unto our fathers<S>1</S> from the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>6924</S>.
